programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: After Darrin, in a fit of frustration, says that they should tell everyone about Sam being a witch, she makes him dream about that very situation and the reactions of their friends and the US government.

programme.title: Surfing Australia TV
programme.desc: Showcases Surfing Australia's programs from junior development through to the elite athletes in surfing.

programme.title: Superman II
programme.desc: A trio of Krypton villains threaten havoc on Earth, while Superman and Lois Lane are just becoming involved in a long-awaited love affair - an affair which may cost Superman his superpowers.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran accidently eats Grace's imaginary friend Imogene.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran and the kids prepare to celebrate Christmas alone when Maxwell and CC have to go on a business trip.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While George is disturbed by a doll that looks like his mum, his dad searches for a long-lost cousin in Italy.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Following the unexpected postponement of their wedding, George badgers Susan for permission to set up Jerry with her maid of honour, Hallie.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Moriticia's favourite charity is having an auction - so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Aunt Clara falls for Darrin's elderly Japanese client. Samantha tries to locate her boyfriend Ochy.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: While trying to retrieve Tabitha's toy flying saucer, Aunt Clara summons a real flying saucer complete with alien crew.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maxwell convinces Fran to go on a date with a soap opera star to get him to agree to appear in a play.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maxwell's old nanny comes to visit and complains about Fran's job as a nanny.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While shopping for a new crested blazer, Jerry gets out of buying one he doesn't like by claiming he wants to bring a friend to see it.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George gets his boss hooked on calzones, Kramer develops an addiction to freshly dried clothes. Meanwhile, Jerry dates a woman of unusually persuasive beauty, and Elaine falls for a man's clever dating tactics.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Detective Sherlock Holmes and his stalwart partner Watson engage in a battle of wits and brawn with a nemesis whose plot is a threat to all of England.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While shopping for a new crested blazer, Jerry gets out of buying one he doesn't like by claiming he wants to bring a friend to see it.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George gets his boss hooked on calzones, Kramer develops an addiction to freshly dried clothes. Meanwhile, Jerry dates a woman of unusually persuasive beauty, and Elaine falls for a man's clever dating tactics.

programme.title: Love Island All Stars
programme.desc: Maya Jama is a shoulder to cry on as a group of Love Island All Stars return to paradise for the first time ever - ALL hoping that they can find romance the second time around.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: A peek inside the unconventional lives of six successful women navigating an exclusive social circle in a city where religion, status and perfection are praised to the highest degree.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: A peek inside the unconventional lives of six successful women navigating an exclusive social circle in a city where religion, status and perfection are praised to the highest degree.

programme.title: Beyond The Farm: Men At Work
programme.desc: In episode one of this series, we follow 18-year-old Reuben's first summer in business.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: With their parents away for the night, Barbie, Skipper, and Stacie recruit Ken for an elaborate plan to bring Chelsea's imaginary 'Roof Fairy' to life.

programme.title: Barney's World
programme.desc: Vivie's upset when her painting gets ruined so Barney takes the kids on a high-seas adventure. / Barney shows Mel the importance of not just respecting nature, but also being a caretaker of it.

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Finding the Crown of Control is easier than expected when the team meets the King of the Creatures but extracting it back to Brooklyn is much harder.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: It's Apple Picking Day, but Benny has trouble enjoying himself. / When Filipa has a recurring nightmare about a giant chicken, the Hoppers come up with different ways to help Filipa.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst QuadDrive
programme.desc: After losing a match to Valt, Bel succeeds in improving his launch power. This new-found ability enables the unveiling of a new blading club set to be captained by an old rival.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Finally, Team Persona's next match has been set! Without any details, Persona takes the stage alongside two other teams: Yggdrasil and Zooganic. Robin's the first Persona member to take on this new battle format.

programme.title: Lego Friends: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Andrea's \.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: Barbie passes on her father-daughter tradition to Chelsea, but soon discovers she may not be as grown-up as she thought she was.

programme.title: Theatre Dome
programme.sub-title: I am Wearing a van Gogh
programme.desc: Welcome to the TheatreDome where two teams are battling for eternal acting glory! The players concoct many medical marvels - but can their cures mend the Overseer's wicked whims in today's challenges?

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream chasers keep Izzie's disappearance a secret in the waking world while Izzie faces off against the King of the Creatures in the dream world.

programme.title: Jeopardy! Australia
programme.desc: Stephen Fry hosts legendary quiz show Jeopardy! Featuring Australian contestants, players guess the questions to the answers given. The winner gets to claim the title and keep the prize money.

programme.title: Australian Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: Tonight is Grand Final 2 and it's down to the best-of-the-best in the nail-biting conclusion of Australian Ninja Warrior where there's $200,000 up for grabs and the title of Australian Ninja Warrior.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maxwell convinces Fran to go on a date with a soap opera star to get him to agree to appear in a play.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maxwell's old nanny comes to visit and complains about Fran's job as a nanny.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While shopping for a new crested blazer, Jerry gets out of buying one he doesn't like by claiming he wants to bring a friend to see it.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George gets his boss hooked on calzones, Kramer develops an addiction to freshly dried clothes. Meanwhile, Jerry dates a woman of unusually persuasive beauty, and Elaine falls for a man's clever dating tactics.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's Midwestern pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Uncle Arthur gives Darrin a charm that he says will protect him from all harm and all witchcraft.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Endora places a spell on Darrin so that everyone he meets is completely charmed by him.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Sylvia gets Fran plots at the cemetery for her birthday as a way to set her up with the mortuary manager.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Maxwell volunteers Fran to produce Gracie's school play.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George's job is jeopardised by his boss' failing memory, Kramer and Newman hatch a money-making scheme; Elaine's boss sends her to buy JFK's golf clubs and Jerry's car is kidnapped.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A garage mechanic steals Jerry's car. Elaine tries to win J Peterman JFK's presidential golf clubs at an auction. George is asked to work on a mysterious assignment.

programme.title: Arrival
programme.desc: A linguist is recruited by the military to communicate with alien life forms after 12 mysterious spacecrafts land around the world.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George's job is jeopardised by his boss' failing memory, Kramer and Newman hatch a money-making scheme; Elaine's boss sends her to buy JFK's golf clubs and Jerry's car is kidnapped.

programme.desc: A garage mechanic steals Jerry's car. Elaine tries to win J Peterman JFK's presidential golf clubs at an auction. George is asked to work on a mysterious assignment.

programme.title: The 100
programme.desc: Clarke's arrival on the island quickly takes a turn for the worse. Meanwhile, Bellamy tries to avoid further tragedy in Arkadia.

programme.title: Love Island All Stars
programme.desc: As the flirtfest continues, everyone wants to talk to Mollie, but Jake struggles to find his place in the Villa.

programme.desc: A peek inside the unconventional lives of six successful women navigating an exclusive social circle in a city where religion, status and perfection are praised to the highest degree.

programme.desc: Stephen Fry hosts legendary quiz show Jeopardy! Featuring Australian contestants, players guess the questions to the answers given. The winner gets to claim the title and keep the prize money.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: Barbie passes on her father-daughter tradition to Chelsea, but soon discovers she may not be as grown-up as she thought she was.

programme.title: Barney's World
programme.sub-title: The Great Grateful Scavenger Hunt/David The Hero
programme.desc: Barney creates a magical scavenger hunt to help Mel focus on gratitude./ When David feels quiet, Barney helps kids discover different play styles.

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream chasers keep Izzie's disappearance a secret in the waking world while Izzie faces off against the King of the Creatures in the dream world.

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: Penny tries to save a tree from being cut down but has a hard time convincing others. / When a book gives Benny a nightmare, Lonny encourages Benny to get rid of ALL the books in his shop.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst QuadDrive
programme.desc: Phelix Payne challenges Ilya and Bashara. His true target is the High Prince. As he takes down Rashad's allies and rivals, it's a question of who could be next on his list.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Next up in the Triple Battle are Multi, Jian, and Zonamos. But when Zonamos passes on an opportunity to pose a new riddle, Multi knows something is up! Blader X is engaged in his own battle: a battle against sushi!

programme.title: Lego Friends: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Mia, Stephanie, Emma, Oliva, and Andrea are trapped in an old tunnel hidden under Andrea's mansion while Autumn, Nova, Leo, Liann get to know Imani.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: Barbie has a crazy dream as she tries to decide what career to choose.

programme.title: Theatre Dome
programme.desc: Welcome to the TheatreDome where two teams are battling for eternal acting glory! A ferris wheel is out of control, and only the clowns can fix it! Can our players save the show?

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The Never Witch creates a doppel monster to eliminate the dream chasers once and for all as she casts her master spell to undo the dream world.

programme.title: Australian Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The biggest names are invited back to compete on five of Ninja World's toughest obstacles, to break national and international records, win cash prizes and claim all-important bragging rights.
